digest.title: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
Google’s first smart speaker in six years arrives next week
digest.tldr: Google's first new smart speaker in six years starts shipping on June 25th, narrowly missing its promised spring launch window.  Preorders for the Google Home Speaker open today, June 17th.

digest.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
digest.tldr: UK government partners with Google DeepMind to build a new AI-powered prototype aimed at faster housing decisions.
